Vernier Reading Simulator

The simulator was developed by Assist. Prof. Dr.Phanphong Kongphan, Department of Industrial Engineering, Faculty of Engineering, Rajamangala University of Technology Thanyaburi.
Least count: 0.02 mm
Relation: 50 vernier div = 49 mm main scale
Unit: mm
Magnified Reading Window
The magnified view shows the full vernier scale and keeps the overlap with the main scale for easier identification of the coinciding line.

Student Response

Last whole millimeter to the left of the vernier zero.
Coinciding line × least count.
Main scale + vernier reading.
Please enter Name and Surname and Student ID, then click Start Test before using the simulator. At least 5 answered questions are required before submitting results.
Score
0 / 0
Measurement range
0 - 150 mm
